testcase.name: testSerialAgent
testcase.system-out:
14:56:57.472 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.OpenClawClient -- OpenClawClient initialized with base URL: https://openclaw.example.com 14:56:57.472 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.OpenClawClientManager -- Initialized OpenClaw client: production 14:56:57.473 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.OpenClawClient -- OpenClawClient initialized with base URL: http://127.0.0.1:18789 14:56:57.473 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.OpenClawClientManager -- Initialized OpenClaw client: local
=== Testing Serial Agent === 14:57:29.620 [main] ERROR cn.welsione.client.http.OpenClawHttpClient -- Request to /agent failed: timeout 14:57:53.982 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.http.OpenClawHttpClient -- Request to /agent successful, status: 200 14:57:54.385 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.http.OpenClawHttpClient -- Request to /agent successful, status: 200 Result: BatchResult{total=3, success=2, failed=1} Total: 3 Success: 2 Failed: 1 14:57:54.510 [main] INFO cn.welsione.client.OpenClawClientManager -- All OpenClaw clients closed
